mdtools.success_summary: The agent completed the subsection relocation with dual-scorer agreement.

hybrid.failure_summary: The agent moved Database Migration under Maintenance but dropped the Server Provisioning subsection, producing heading_tree, block_order, and block_text mismatches under both scorers.

unix.failure_summary: The agent reached the 30-turn cap with Database Migration still under Deployment rather than moved under Maintenance; both scorers reported heading_tree, block_order, and block_text mismatches.

notes: This candidate produced an mdtools-only pass, but T10's headline and promotion gates use hybrid-minus-unix; with hybrid and unix both failing, there is no promotable gap.
The unix-adversary review labels the measured outcome as both-fail/no-gap, not AST-structural, because the tool-enabled hybrid cell did not pass.
